core_mechanism: Bose-Einstein condensation of many discrete microscopic constituents into a single macroscopically occupied mode, so that a coherent collective ground state emerges from a disordered many-body system and its large-scale effective (hydrodynamic/continuum) dynamics is extracted from the condensate order parameter
brief_reason: The abstract proposes that the continuum phase emerges from discrete quantum structures as a Bose-Einstein condensate of the underlying quanta, treating the system as condensed matter whose effective continuum dynamics is derived from that condensed phase.
